handoff.note: Handoff written to meta/handoff_latest.json: pkg_hash s6-a3f7e1, next focus S6.2 TapeAnalyzer, open geometry question for platformCheckCount flagged as a critical warning.

acceptance.criterion: S6.1 delivers the campaign-state HALF of REQ-030 (modeling the global campaign state): CampaignState.ts types all ten macro variables + ZERO_CAMPAIGN_STATE identity. The DIRECTOR half (the fold that actually updates state from level records) is S6.5's CampaignDirector.ts — REQ-030 stays IN_PROGRESS in the backlog until S6.6 per the per-REQ VERIFIED schedule.

S6.1 types all ten macro state variables (knowledgeState, behaviorState, emotionalState, skillCurve, mechanicsIntroduced, mechanicsMastered, optimizationDepth, curiosityTrend, chapterHealth, retentionPrediction) on CampaignState, each grounded in a concrete shape (not a stub/any). Continuous TRACKING (the fold across a campaign) lands S6.2-S6.5; REQ-031 stays IN_PROGRESS in the backlog until S6.6.
